channel.title: Cost-Monitoring on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Cost-Monitoring on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: OpenCost vs Goldilocks vs Crane: Kubernetes Cost Monitoring Guide 2026
item.description: Kubernetes clusters are notorious for silent budget blowouts. Without proper visibility, teams over-provision CPU and memory, pay for idle pods, and struggle to allocate cloud spend across namespaces and teams. Self-hosted Kubernetes cost monitoring tools solve this by providing real-time cost allocation, resource optimization recommendations, and FinOps-grade reporting — all within your own infrastructure.
